name: Rugby cloth handbag
description:
Authentic Hermès orange canvas shoulder bag featuring a unique sporty design with rope strap detail and silver-tone hardware. This eye-catching piece blends luxury with a casual, modern aesthetic — perfect for everyday wear or statement styling.

The vibrant Hermès orange canvas is paired with a structured silhouette and secure zip closure. The standout rope strap adds a distinctive touch, making this bag both functional and fashion-forward.
Includes LegitApp authentication tag for verification.

Condition:
Very good pre-owned condition. Exterior canvas is clean and well-maintained. Interior shows light signs of use with minor staining (see photos). Hardware remains bright and in great condition.

Features:

Hermès signature orange canvas
Zip closure
Unique rope strap detail
Silver-tone hardware
Lightweight and versatile
A rare and stylish Hermès piece that stands out from traditional designs.
